---
title: "R Notebook"
output: 
  html_document:
    keep_md: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# 设置全局选项
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  cache = TRUE,
  dev = "png",
  dev.args = list(type = "cairo-png"),
  dpi = 300
)

# 清理环境
rm(list = ls())
gc()
```

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE}
# 首先加载基础包
library(tidyverse)  # 包含 ggplot2, dplyr, readr, purrr
library(lubridate)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r read_data}
# 使用 try-catch 来处理数据读取
tryCatch({
  # 读取数据时添加类型检查
  data <- read_csv("/Users/minggong/Documents/Tytell_Lab/Project_UpDown/Data/7_Stats_Analysis/2022_alldata_v2.csv",
                   show_col_types = FALSE,
                   col_types = cols(
                     date = col_date(),
                     fish = col_character()
                   ))
  
  trial_info_v2 <- read_csv("/Users/minggong/Documents/Tytell_Lab/Project_UpDown/Data/Qualitative/trial_info_v2.csv",
                           show_col_types = FALSE) %>% 
    select(ID, fish, date, trial, vertical_direction)
}, error = function(e) {
  stop("Error reading data files: ", e$message)
})
```

```{r process_data}
# 数据预处理，添加错误处理和数据验证
tryCatch({
  # 1. 日期转换
  trial_info_v2$date <- ymd(trial_info_v2$date)
  
  # 2. 数据合并前的验证
  if(any(is.na(trial_info_v2$date))) {
    warning("Some dates in trial_info_v2 are NA after conversion")
  }
  
  # 3. 数据合并
  data <- left_join(data, trial_info_v2, by = c("date", "fish", "trial"))
  
  # 4. 过滤和转换
  data <- data %>% 
    filter(cyclenum < 6) %>%
    mutate(phase_diff = phase_diff * -1)
  
  # 5. 验证处理后的数据
  if(any(is.na(data$phase_diff))) {
    warning("Some phase_diff values are NA after processing")
  }
  
  # 6. 输出数据基本信息
  print(sprintf("Processed data dimensions: %d rows, %d columns", nrow(data), ncol(data)))
  
}, error = function(e) {
  stop("Error in data processing: ", e$message)
})
```

```{r}
colnames(data)
```

```{r}
unique(data$date)
unique(data$fish)
```

```{r}
# Remove the rows if mean_bodyangle_deg is NA
data <- data %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(mean_bodyangle_deg))
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_bodyangle_deg, y = phase_diff, color = fish)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", aes(group = 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Mean body angle (degrees)",
       y = "Phase difference",
       color = "Fish")
ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_bodyangle_deg, y = phase_diff, color = fish)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, aes(group = fish)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Mean body angle (degrees)",
       y = "Phase difference",
       color = "Fish")
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_original_angle_deg, y = phase_diff, color = fish)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", aes(group = 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Mean original body angle (degrees)",
       y = "Phase difference",
       color = "Fish")
```


```{r}
# "phase_diff" is modeled as a function of "mean_bodyangle_deg" with random intercepts for each fish
model_PhaseDiff_MeanAngle <- lmer(phase_diff ~ mean_bodyangle_deg + (1 | fish), data = data)
summary(model_PhaseDiff_MeanAngle)
coef(model_PhaseDiff_MeanAngle)
```

```{r}
model_PhaseDiff_MeanOriginalAngle <- lmer(phase_diff ~ mean_original_angle_deg + (1 | fish), data = data)
summary(model_PhaseDiff_MeanOriginalAngle)
coef(model_PhaseDiff_MeanOriginalAngle)
```


```{r}
mean_original_angle_deg <- seq(-40,40, by=10)
fish <- c("ms03", "ms04", "ms05", "ms02", "ms06")

newdata <- tidyr::expand_grid(mean_original_angle_deg, fish)

newdata$phase_diff <- predict(model_PhaseDiff_MeanOriginalAngle, newdata=newdata)
```


```{r}
ggplot(newdata, aes(x = mean_original_angle_deg, y = phase_diff, color = fish)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(intercept = 7.748e-03, slope = 1.800e-03, color = "black")

```


```{r}
plot(model_PhaseDiff_MeanAngle)
plot(model_PhaseDiff_MeanOriginalAngle)
```


```{r}
null_model <- lmer(phase_diff ~ 1 + (1 | fish), data = data)
anova(model_PhaseDiff_MeanOriginalAngle, null_model)  # Likelihood ratio test
```

```{r}
r.squaredGLMM(model_PhaseDiff_MeanOriginalAngle)
# m: marginal
# c: conditional
```

```{r}
data <- data %>%
  mutate(mean_angvel_degs = mean_angvel_rads * (180 / pi))
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_angvel_rads, y = phase_diff, color = vertical_direction)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", aes(group = 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Mean angular velocity (rad/s)",
       y = "Phase difference",
       color = "Fish")
ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_angvel_degs, y = phase_diff, color = vertical_direction)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", aes(group = 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Mean angular velocity (deg/s)",
       y = "Phase difference",
       color = "Fish")
```

```{r}
model_PhaseDiff_AngVelDegs <- lmer(phase_diff ~ mean_angvel_degs + (1 | fish), data = data)
summary(model_PhaseDiff_AngVelDegs)
coef(model_PhaseDiff_AngVelDegs)
```

```{r}
model_PhaseDiff_AngVelRads <- lmer(phase_diff ~ mean_angvel_rads + (1 | fish), data = data)
summary(model_PhaseDiff_AngVelRads)
coef(model_PhaseDiff_AngVelRads)
```

```{r}
mean_angvel_degs <- seq(-40,40, by=10)
fish <- c("ms03", "ms04", "ms05", "ms02", "ms06")

newdata1 <- tidyr::expand_grid(mean_angvel_degs, fish)

newdata1$phase_diff <- predict(model_PhaseDiff_AngVelDegs, newdata=newdata1)
```

```{r}
ggplot(newdata1, aes(x = mean_angvel_degs, y = phase_diff, color = fish)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(intercept = 4.385e-03, slope = -1.111e-03, color = "black")
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_original_angle_deg, y = mean_angvel_degs)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", aes(group = 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Mean original angle (deg)",
       y = "Mean angular velocity (deg/s)")
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_original_angle_deg, fill = vertical_direction)) + 
  geom_histogram()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_angvel_degs, fill = vertical_direction)) + 
  geom_histogram()
```

```{r}
data[which.min(data$mean_original_angle_deg),]
data[which.min(data$mean_angvel_degs), ]
```

```{r}
data[which.max(data$mean_original_angle_deg),]
data[which.max(data$mean_angvel_degs),]
```

```{r}
quantile(data$mean_original_angle_deg, probs = seq(0, 1, 1/3))
quantile(data$mean_angvel_degs, probs = seq(0, 1, 1/3))
```

```{r}
data <- data %>% 
  mutate(beginning_pitching = case_when(mean_original_angle_deg > 6.08  ~  "PU",
                                        mean_original_angle_deg > -1.9 & mean_original_angle_deg <= 6.08  ~  "PH",
                                        mean_original_angle_deg <= -1.9 ~ "PD"),
         swimming_direction = case_when(mean_angvel_degs > 1.45 ~ "SU",
                                        mean_angvel_degs > -1.88 & mean_angvel_degs <= 1.45 ~ "SH",
                                        mean_angvel_degs <= -1.88 ~ "SD"))
```

```{r}
View(data)
```
